author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- GeneratorInterface/Core is the only package that uses this service. 
- Moved all the testing code as well.

This is part of a campaign to reduce the dependencies needed to build FWCore packages.

#### PR validation:

Code compiles, unit tests pass.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2117
title: Moved ExternalRandomNumberGeneratorService to GeneratorInterface
